behaviors.description: The embedding vector produced for a given query string has the correct dimensionality for the vector database index.
behaviors.justification: A real failure can come from mismatch between live embedding model output dimension and the actual index schema/config. In-process mocks can hide provider/model-version drift and always return expected length.
behaviors.test_description: Run the API with the real embedding endpoint and real vector index metadata. Submit a fixed query, inspect produced vector length, and assert it equals the index dimension; fail if request is rejected or dimension differs.

behaviors.description: The similarity search returns results ordered by descending cosine similarity score.
behaviors.justification: This is mainly a wiring/DB-query correctness boundary across embedding output, vector store, and ranking logic. A unit test can miss real ordering behavior of the vector DB/query path.
behaviors.test_description: Seed a local test vector DB with known vectors, run similarity search through the real search module, and assert returned scores are monotonically non-increasing and IDs match expected nearest neighbors.

behaviors.description: The LLM re-ranking step changes the order of at least some results compared to the raw similarity ranking when the query has nuanced intent.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real LLM judgment of nuanced intent. Mocked rerankers or deterministic stubs can pass while hiding real model behavior variability and quality failures.
behaviors.test_description: Use real LLM reranking on a curated nuanced-query fixture where lexical similarity and contextual intent conflict. Compare pre/post ranking over multiple runs and assert at least one meaningful reorder occurs in most runs.

behaviors.description: A query with no close matches in the database returns an empty result set rather than low-relevance noise.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is retrieval thresholding plus DB result handling. Pure unit mocks can hide score distributions and threshold application errors that appear only with real query+index interaction.
behaviors.test_description: Populate local vector DB with embeddings far from a test query, run full retrieval (before rerank), and assert API returns empty results when all similarity scores are below configured cutoff.

behaviors.description: The end-to-end latency from receiving the query to returning re-ranked results stays below 2 seconds for the median case.
behaviors.justification: Latency depends on real HTTP/API calls, network, process runtime, and orchestration overhead. Mocked dependencies can systematically hide true performance regressions.
behaviors.test_description: Run a median-latency benchmark against deployed service path (real embedding call, real vector search path, real rerank call) over representative query set; assert p50 end-to-end latency < 2.0s.
